arts.ttl: Kyreece Lisbie on target as Colchester United under-21s slide to heavy defeat
arts.sum: Colchester were reduced to ten players before Dixon wrapped up Charlton's win, a minute later. Charlton had a player sent off just after the hour mark but scored their sixth when a loose ball was seized upon by Enslin on 72 minutes.

arts.ttl: Danny Cowley ready for 'brilliant test' for Colchester side against Wimbledon
arts.sum: But they face a Wimbledon side who themselves are flying, with Johnnie Jackson's team having embarked on an 11-match unbeaten sequence in League Two as they chase automatic promotion. “They’re a very, very good team and have all of the tools to be successful in League Two and I anticipate them to be promoted automatically, come the end of the season."

arts.ttl: Danny Cowley: continuity and rhythm fuelling Colchester United's unbeaten run
arts.sum: "It's such a tactical game, I didn't want to throw boys in (against Notts County), that hadn't played together because I didn't think that was fair on them. Colchester extended their unbeaten run in midweek with a creditable 1-1 draw at promotion-chasing Notts County, barely 72 hours after their 630-mile round trip to Carlisle United.

Colchester's 1-1 draw with Notts County in midweek was seventh game without defeat, winning four and drawing three. AFC Wimbledon are in a rich vein of form themselves. Their 0-0 draw with Fleetwood ...
